calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (Dept. 514 heard in Room 504B)

Appearances on WEDNESDAY-AUG-31-2011: Daniel R. Stern, attorney for plaintiff;
Julie Anderson, property manager/representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff;
Kim Y. Arnone, limited scope attorney appearing for and with defendant Cozette Pooler

Settlement conference is held, case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the court this day. Plaintiff's counsel retains the original agreement. The September 6, 2011 trial date is vacated.
